jd_text:
This is high-performing, tech-driven trading firm is hiring a Head of Trading to join its growing market making team. This is a front-office role within a fast-paced, data-led environment where trading, technology, and liquidity provision intersect.
You’ll work alongside experienced traders and quants, executing across regional and global markets while contributing to strategy development and market-making activity. The setup is lean, collaborative, and built for performance — ideal for someone who wants real impact and exposure to modern trading infrastructure.
What You’ll DoExecute equities trades across UAE and international marketsIdentify opportunities using technical and fundamental analysisPartner with quants to refine and implement trading strategiesManage order flow, execution, and risk in real timeSupport liquidity provision and market efficiencyMentor junior talent within the desk
Must-Have Experience7+ years in equities tradingBuy-side or sell-side execution backgroundStrong understanding of market structure and flowExperience with Bloomberg or RefinitivProven ability to perform under pressure
Why This RoleFront-row seat in a tech-led trading businessDirect impact on PnL and strategyHigh-performance, no-silos environment
ApplyWe’ll respond to all shortlisted candidates within 2 working days.
